introSection: Backlot Stunt Coaster (formerly Italian Job Turbo Coaster) is a steel launched roller coaster located at Kings Dominion in Doswell, Virginia, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride opened as Italian Job: Turbo Coaster on May 27, 2006, during Kings Dominion's final season under Paramount Parks/CBS ownership.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 3 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 12 riders per train.

sections.title: Theming
sections.content: The ride is themed around a runaway car. Halfway through the ride, a police chopper fires bullets at the guests, then the car is off again down into the lengthy tunnel.

fullText:
Backlot Stunt Coaster (formerly Italian Job Turbo Coaster) is a steel launched roller coaster located at Kings Dominion in Doswell, Virginia, USA.

The ride opened as Italian Job: Turbo Coaster on May 27, 2006, during Kings Dominion's final season under Paramount Parks/CBS ownership.



3 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 12 riders per train.

The ride is themed around a runaway car. Halfway through the ride, a police chopper fires bullets at the guests, then the car is off again down into the lengthy tunnel.
